text: Create app now saves your app to My apps right away, and reopening the builder always picks up your latest workflow edits.
Heads-up before a run your balance can't cover, and clear "out of balance — top up at nano-gpt.com" errors instead of raw 402s.
Shared and exported apps now greet signed-out visitors with a short, honest note — this runs AI on your own nano-gpt key, the key stays in your browser, and each run shows what it cost.
New to nano-gpt? The sign-in panel now offers a friendly "create an account" link — pay-per-use, no subscription needed, key stays in your browser.

Combine is fixed — clips now join instantly and exactly, with audio locked to picture: no more freezing partway, drifting out of sync, dropped frames at seams, or over-long output. Matching formats stitch losslessly.
Rename any node — type a name under its header and it shows wherever that step appears in your exported app.
Sort the model picker — pick Cheapest, Priciest, Newest or A→Z from the header dropdown (your choice is remembered).
See what a workflow costs before you run it — a live "~$X to run" estimate in the editor and next to Run in shared/exported apps, and every model now lists its price in the picker.
Runs that stop partway keep their work — click ⧉ to open Run steps and see every step's output, even results made before the error.
Rename an app from the builder — click its title, type a new name, press Enter. It sticks across reloads and in "My apps".
Editing an app shows one "Update <name>" button with a ▾ "Save as a new app" — no more confusing twin buttons.
Clicking Run while signed out now offers an inline choice — sign in or paste your NanoGPT key — instead of redirecting to login.
Drag a wire off an input to move it elsewhere, or onto empty canvas to detach it — fixes inputs stuck to two sources.
Scrolling to the end of a prompt box no longer zooms the canvas out (zoom back with Ctrl/⌘ + scroll).
First time in the app builder, a one-time hint explains that ✎ Edit workflow returns to the graph and keeps your app.
New visitors get a one-time "press ▶ Run, or ＋ Add node" hint and a 🖼️ Gallery button to browse & remix examples.
New ⊡ Fit button (F key, or double-click empty canvas) frames your whole workflow; the demo graph auto-fits on load.
Undo/redo the canvas — Ctrl/Cmd+Z restores a deleted node or wire, Shift+Z (or Ctrl+Y) redoes; hover a wire to remove it.
Shorter share links + share-to-social — shrink a link (TinyURL/da.gd) and post to X, Reddit, Facebook or email; exported apps get a title card.
Resize any node by dragging its bottom-right corner — and prompt boxes start bigger.
Version history no longer loses work — applying a change off an older version adds a new one instead of wiping later ones, and unsaved canvas edits auto-save first.
Shared & exported apps now respect a fixed Seed too — an unchanged result won't regenerate or re-charge.
Set a Seed on Image/Edit/Inpaint to lock a result (no regenerate, no re-charge); leave it blank for a fresh roll each run.
New 💬 Describe changes — edit your workflow in plain words and it updates the canvas instantly (undo in one click).
Video nodes hide modes they can't use — a Text→Video node no longer offers "Edit Video" or "Reference to Video".
New 🏆 Submit button — grab your Cookoff entry link, see the prizes, and post to Discord or r/nanocurrency in one place.
Fixed the 🎙️ Transcribe node — speech-to-text was failing every run; it returns text again.
LLM node now takes audio — wire a clip (or a 🗣️ Speech node) into a listening model to transcribe, describe or critique it.
Edit node now takes multiple reference images — composite a product, scene and face on models that support it (Nano-Banana, Seedream…).
Image nodes can make several variations at once — pick the best from a thumbnail strip.
Transcribe: models with a fixed language list now use a dropdown, so you can't mistype a code.
Video nodes expose more per-model knobs — negative prompt, seed, CFG and more under ⚙️ Model options.
Video models that generate sound (Veo 3, Kling, Seedance…) now play their audio in the preview instead of staying muted.
LLM node ⚙️ advanced — set temperature & max tokens, force JSON output, and pick reasoning effort, per model.
Avatar / lipsync now works with a 🗣️ Speech node's audio — fixed a "Failed to fetch" when turning TTS into a talking video.
Lipsync now explains how to fix a too-long chained song instead of just failing.
Lipsync hides multi-speaker avatars that need two voices — the picker only offers ones that run on a single TTS track.
Sharing an app flags when you've tweaked a model or prompt — a heads-up that the link copies the app, not your current session.
Add-node menu is now searchable — type to filter (↑↓/Enter), with your recent nodes and a "Start here" list pinned up top.
New ✂️ Trim node to cut audio to a start + length — and lipsync now takes long songs, auto-trimming to the avatar model's limit.
Apps built from an Edit node now let people type their own edit instruction, not just the baked-in style.
Closing the ✨ Create app window no longer loses your app — reopen and pick up where you left off.
Image & video nodes show each model's real sizes, resolutions, aspect ratios and durations — and the price tracks your choice.

New 🎨 LoRA on Image, Edit & Video nodes — paste any HuggingFace .safetensors URL to restyle, and stack several to blend. Works on Flux, FLUX.2, Z-Image and LTX; hit "try an example" for a one-click demo.
New 📣 Updates button — a running changelog of what's new, right in the editor.
Added a 🍜 Noodle Cookoff contest announcement.
Simplified the first run — you land straight on a clean canvas.
Inpaint: widened the picker to 17 verified mask-honoring edit models.
New Inpaint node — brush a region of an image and repaint just that area.
